meaning: n.贪婪者,色狼 pl.wolf的复数
examples: He says the media are ravening wolves.
Wolves get a bad rap , says a woman who owns three.
"I'm absolutely gutted and am still coming to terms with it, " said the Warrington Wolves captain.
The coureurs des bois faced deadly rapids, canyons, blizzards, bears, wolves, and marauding Iroquois.
